ddls:
CREATE TABLE "music_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the music track */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist of the music track */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album of the music track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the music track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the music track in seconds */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Genre of the music track (foreign key to genres table) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the music track (0.0-1.0) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the music track (0.0-1.0) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the music track (0.0-1.0) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the music track (0.0-1.0) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the music track (0.0-1.0) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the music track (0.0-1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the music track (in beats per minute) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the music track (0.0-1.0) */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the music track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the music track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (foreign key to roles table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the playlist (foreign key to users table) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Playlist that the track belongs to (foreign key to playlists table) */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Track in the playlist (foreign key to music_tracks table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listens" (
  "listen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listen event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who listened to the track (foreign key to users table) */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Track that was listened to (foreign key to music_tracks table) */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date and time the track was listened to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role that the permission belongs to (foreign key to roles table) */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each music track

Duration of the music track in seconds
